meaning: 丹老[缅甸南部港市](音译墨吉)
examples: A fishing boat moves past the Myanmar's Mergui Archipelago.
A Moken fishing boat moves past one of the Sister Islands at sunset in Myanmar's Mergui Archipelago.
The 200 or so Moken living on the Surin Islands are part of a larger ethnic group spread out across the Mergui Archipelago off the coasts of Burma and Thailand.
